full_prompt: Design the primary pressure shell of the crew living-quarters module of a lunar-surface habitat for a space-design tender-response benchmark. The shell is an aluminum cylindrical monocoque with hemispherical endcaps, internal volume 100 m^3, outer diameter 4.5 m, cylindrical length 5.5 m, total length including endcaps 9.0 m. Material is Aluminum 2219-T87 (Young's modulus 73 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 352 MPa, ultimate 455 MPa, density 2840 kg/m^3). Shell wall nominal thickness 6 mm; endcap nominal thickness 5 mm. Maximum Expected Operating Pressure (MEOP) is 101.325 kPa (one atmosphere) internal with zero external on the lunar surface. Following ANSI/AIAA S-080A-2018 metallic pressure vessel rules and ECSS-E-ST-32-02C Rev.2, design factors are: proof = 1.5 x MEOP = 152 kPa, burst (non-hazardous crewed) = 2.0 x MEOP = 203 kPa, yield FoS = 1.25, ultimate FoS = 1.4. Load cases: (LC1) internal pressure at MEOP 101.325 kPa; (LC2) proof pressure 152 kPa; (LC3) burst pressure 203 kPa must not produce ultimate failure; (LC4) seismic - lunar moonquake 0.1 g horizontal baseline; (LC5) thermal: outer-skin swing -170 C (shadow) to +120 C (sun) with internal held at 22 C; gradient across 6 mm wall applied as 1D thermal analysis. Pass/fail: (R1) yield FoS 1.25 on LC1 means max von Mises <= 281 MPa; (R2) ultimate FoS 1.4 on LC1 means max stress <= 325 MPa; (R3) under LC3 burst, no ultimate violation (stress <= 455 MPa); (R4) shell + endcap total mass must stay below 4500 kg; (R5) linear buckling eigenvalue under external-pressure 20 kPa fault-case must exceed 2.0. Deliverables: STEP AP242, pressure-vessel FEA across LC1-LC3, thermal FEA, modal for first 5 axial + ovalization modes, buckling eigenvalue, and a mass + wall-thickness map.
short_prompt:
Design the primary pressure shell of the crew living-quarters module of a lunar-surface habitat. The shell is an aluminum 2219-T87-class cylindrical monocoque with hemispherical endcaps, internal volume 100 m^3. Qualify per ANSI/AIAA S-080A-2018 and ECSS-E-ST-32-02C Rev.2 metallic-pressure-vessel rules, with yield FoS 1.25, ultimate FoS 1.4, proof 1.5 x MEOP, burst 2.0 x MEOP (non-hazardous crewed class).

Envelope: 4.5 m OD, 9.0 m total length (5.5 m cylindrical + hemi endcaps).

Load cases.
- LC1 MEOP: 101.325 kPa internal (one atmosphere), 0 kPa external.
- LC2 proof: 152 kPa internal.
- LC3 burst: 203 kPa internal, must not produce ultimate failure.
- LC4 moonquake: 0.1 g horizontal.
- LC5 thermal: outer skin -170 C (shadow) to +120 C (sun), interior held at 22 C.
Plus a 20 kPa external-pressure fault case for buckling margin.

prompt.title: Lunar habitat crew-quarters pressure shell
prompt.brief: 2219-T87 Al pressure shell, 4.5 m OD x 9 m L, compliant with AIAA S-080A and ECSS-E-ST-32-02C.
